_schema.description: Cross-session tactical lessons for the multi-agent Lean prover (issue #1081 Part 2/3). Conservation state: this file persists across iterations, unlike ephemeral attempt history. Populated by the prover at end of session.

partial_progress.best_state_file: string - path to a checked-in cookbook .lean
residual_context: string - hypotheses available at the sorry
partial_progress.closure_hint: string - how the human-written proof closed it

_schema.note: project keys: 'stable_marriage', 'voting', 'social_choice', etc. Keep entries deduplicated by goal_signature.

partial_progress.goal_signature: gsMenPrefLE prof m w (gsChooseMax prof σ m h)
tactic_chain_so_far: change w = gsChooseMax prof σ m h ∨ prof.menPref m (gsChooseMax prof σ m h) < prof.menPref m w
by_cases heq : w = gsChooseMax prof σ m h
· right; have hne : ... ≠ ... := fun h => heq ((prof.menPref_bijective m).injective h).symm
-- SORRY HERE: prof.menPref m (gsChooseMax prof σ m h) < prof.menPref m w
partial_progress.residual_goal: prof.menPref m (gsChooseMax prof σ m h) < prof.menPref m w
residual_context: hmem : Classical.choose (Finset.exists_maximal h) ∈ gsCandidates prof σ m
hmax : ∀ x ∈ gsCandidates prof σ m, Classical.choose (...) ≤ x → Classical.choose (...) = x  (where ≤ is gsMenPrefLE)
hw : w ∈ gsCandidates prof σ m
heq : ¬ (w = gsChooseMax prof σ m h)
hne : prof.menPref m (gsChooseMax prof σ m h) ≠ prof.menPref m w
partial_progress.closure_hint: The original #1120 proof uses Nat.lt_trichotomy (prof.menPref m w) (prof.menPref m c) + rcases htri with (hlt | heq | hgt), where c := Classical.choose ... The hlt branch uses hmax hw (Or.inr hlt) to conclude c = w which contradicts heq; the heq branch closes by injectivity; the hgt branch is the goal directly. The agent's `change` approach is equivalent but didn't reach Nat.lt_trichotomy.

failure_patterns.lesson: GaleShapley.lean:76 gale_shapley_stable, :91 gale_shapley_man_optimal, :119 gale_shapley_woman_pessimal are INTRACTABLE_UNTIL_GS_IMPL. The mmaaz-git reference needs ~1000 LOC of supporting lemmas (algorithm, n^2 step bound, termination, runSteps invariants). Coordinator should mark_sorry_intractable on sight — do NOT spend tactic attempts. Unblocked only by issue #997 (GS algorithm port). VERIFIED REPRODUCIBLE on L76 (C34-01, 138s) and L91 (C34-02, 83s).

failure_patterns.goal_signature: prof.menPref m (gsChooseMax prof σ m h) < prof.menPref m w (strict-inequality from maximality)
failure_patterns.error: agent could not close the final maximality-contradiction step
failure_patterns.lesson: When the residual goal is `a < b` with hypotheses `hmax : ∀ x ∈ S, c ≤ x → c = x` (under a custom `LE` instance `gsMenPrefLE`) and `hne : a ≠ b`, the correct closure is NOT to direct-search the `<`. Instead, do trichotomy on the underlying Nat preference: `have htri := Nat.lt_trichotomy (prof.menPref m w) (prof.menPref m c); rcases htri with (hlt | heq | hgt)`. The hgt branch is the goal; the others contradict via hmax or injectivity. Generic `linarith`/`omega`/`exact?` searches will not find this — Director-level strategic guidance required.
